reviewer: agent matrix pass (headless Chrome, real ~528MB fp32 download+run, first-visit + cached-init architecture, light+dark, mobile+desktop)

rubric.evidence: REAL WASM run verified headless (fresh profile → 'Download model (~528 MB)' → click → download → ready): 'A capital do Brasil é [MASK].' → filled 'Brasília' in 76 ms; predictions #1 Brasília 44.8% (logit 13.91), #2 Salvador 12.8%, #3 Fortaleza, #4 Curitiba, #5 Recife — read from the logits tensor [1,9,29794] via AutoModelForMaskedLM. Console clean (0 errors). Also Node-verified with @huggingface/transformers@3.7.5: same [1,seq,29794] logits, 'Vou pegar o [MASK] para ir trabalhar.' → ônibus, WordPiece split of 'eletroencefalografista' → eletro/##ence/##fal/##ogra/##fi/##sta.
rubric.notes: The ONNX repo ships only onnx/model.onnx (fp32) — no *_quantized.onnx — so the worker loads dtype:'fp32'; the at-a-glance states the real ~528 MB download honestly.

rubric.evidence: Correct shape + semantics: masked-LM logits [1, seq, 29794] over the Portuguese cased WordPiece vocabulary; row sliced at the [MASK] position and softmaxed on-device. Top token 'Brasília' for the Brazil-capital cloze is semantically right, not fake. Multi-mask supported (two-[MASK] sample renders two ranked lists). | conformance: io-shape-semantic=manual.

At-a-glance links luiseduardobrito/bert-base-portuguese-cased-onnx (ONNX build of neuralmind/bert-base-portuguese-cased, BERTimbau), states fill-mask · WASM · fp32 and the honest ~528 MB size. Inference off the main thread in worker.js (AutoModelForMaskedLM, dtype:'fp32'). conformance: declares-model-id/task/backend + inference-off-main-thread all pass.
rubric.notes: Quantisation is fp32 by necessity (no quantized ONNX exists in the repo) — disclosed on the page rather than mislabelled as q8.

rubric.evidence: First visit shows 'Download model (~528 MB)'; after load the shared loader reaches state=ready and drives the sample run. The auto-init-on-cached path uses the byte-identical shared createModelLoader + lib/model-cache.js (cache scanned by modelId, version-agnostic) that was verified END-TO-END this same session on the neobert page (visit 2: NO Download button, 'Clear cached model' present, auto-ran from cache). The optional multilingual comparison keeps its own on-demand 'Download model (~180 MB)' button (mBERT, user-initiated). | conformance: shared-auto-init-loader=pass, auto-init-on-cached=manual.
rubric.notes: First-visit download+run directly verified for this model; cached auto-init verified via the shared loader proven end-to-end on neobert (model-agnostic cache layer).

rubric.evidence: Streamed download progress on first load; Retry surfaced on failure by the shared loader; live #runStatus / #vsStatus region reports 'add a [MASK]' / prediction errors; offline reuse via the transformers.js cache. Runs on the WASM path (no GPU); headless no-GPU run produced real Portuguese fills. | conformance: live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass, honest-progress-retry-offline=manual, runs-without-webgpu-fallback=manual.

Sentence input, Portuguese sample chips, Insert-[MASK] button, top-k slider, clickable prediction rows (fill the mask), the on-demand comparison loader, and the ladder tools (autocomplete accept/reset, register chips, Brazilian-vs-European variant chips, idiom chips, multi-model comparison) all operable and keyboard-accessible. | conformance: controls-operable=manual, buttons-have-names=pass.

Predictions + logits are produced by the on-device AutoModelForMaskedLM run (real samples above); the wild rung's Brazilian-vs-European probe is a real scoreCandidates softmax (ônibus 12.77% vs autocarro 0.00%, trem 7.67% vs comboio 0.04% — Node-measured, reproduced on-device); the multi-model rung runs a SECOND on-device model (mBERT) on the same sentence. No canned result anywhere. | conformance: no-fake-output=manual.

role=status aria-live #runStatus + loader status; labelled input + slider; sample/register/variant/idiom chips are real buttons in labelled groups; prediction rows are keyboard-activatable buttons; WordPiece token chips carry titles; [MASK] shown as <code>. conformance: buttons-have-names=pass, images-have-alt=pass.

Desktop 1280 and mobile 360×740 DPR3 both render with no horizontal overflow (measured 0px), legible text, wrapped at-a-glance table, [MASK] shown as code, chips flex-wrap, token strip wraps, and the prediction grid collapses (logit column hidden) under 560px; light + dark screenshots reviewed. | conformance: responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass, parity-both-classes=manual.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified on both device classes (measured overflow 0px).

rubric.evidence: The masked-LM forward pass + softmax over the 29k vocab runs in a Web Worker; typing is debounced (350 ms); the two-model comparison runs both forwards off-thread via Promise.all. Main thread stays responsive; 0 console errors; 76 ms fill latency. | conformance: inp-stays-low=manual.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up heavy main-thread work; keep the interaction path clear.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference is off the main thread (worker.js runs AutoModelForMaskedLM + the full-vocab softmax); the UI only renders the returned top-k; the comparison uses Promise.all of two off-thread runs; typing is debounced 350 ms.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: 76 ms fill in the worker, page responsive, 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports; let content wrap.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — flex-wrap sample/variant/idiom chips + token strip; a prediction grid that collapses columns (hides the logit column) under 560px; at-a-glance table wraps.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-mobile=pass at 360px; measured 0px horizontal overflow; mobile screenshot reviewed

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Accessible form controls with clear, associated labels; don't rely on placeholder.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the sentence <input> has an associated <label>; the top-k slider is labelled; sample/register/variant chips are real buttons in labelled groups.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce dynamic errors in an aria-live region on the page, not only the console.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live #runStatus / #vsStatus / #cmpStatus report 'add a [MASK]' and prediction/comparison failures with an .err class.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label controls; announce state in a live region; keyboard-operable.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — labelled controls, prediction rows are keyboard-activatable buttons that fill the mask, live status region, [MASK] rendered as <code>.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use modern flex/grid intrinsic sizing for responsive component layouts.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — probe-grid two-column comparison collapses to one column under 620px; token strip is a wrapping flex row.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: desktop + mobile screenshots reviewed, 0px overflow both classes

openQuestions: There is no quantized ONNX for BERTimbau on the Hub, so the download is a heavy ~528 MB fp32. If a q8 export appears upstream, switch dtype to 'q8' for a ~4× smaller download (in-place, disclosed).

followUpGoals.goal: Add a Portuguese POS/NER second model to the multi-model rung to tag the filled sentence (in addition to the Portuguese-vs-multilingual comparison).
If an 8-bit BERTimbau ONNX is published upstream, switch the worker to dtype:'q8' to cut the ~528 MB download.

summary: Revision-1 agent matrix pass for portuguese-bert-fill-mask: real ~528 MB fp32 download + on-device run verified in headless Chrome (first-visit Download → 'A capital do Brasil é Brasília.' at 76 ms WASM, #1 Brasília 44.8% logit 13.91, logits [1,9,29794]; console clean), plus Node-verified Brazilian-vs-European variant showdown (ônibus 12.77% vs autocarro 0.00%) and the WordPiece subword token strip. Cached auto-init verified via the byte-identical shared loader proven end-to-end on neobert this session. Light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (0px overflow, legible, [MASK] renders as code). fp32 (no quantized ONNX exists) disclosed on the page, not mislabelled. Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass; manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above.
